title: stellaria tennesseensis
intro: Stellaria tennesseensis, also known as Tennessee chickweed, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Caryophyllaceae family, typically found in moist areas with shade. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Stellaria tennesseensis include its potential to alleviate symptoms of eczema and other skin conditions, while also acting as a diuretic to aid in urinary issues. Herbal preparations of Stellaria tennesseensis can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams to utilize its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
